name: mcp-code-safety
description: Inspect tool results for unsafe code / scripts / executable content before they re-enter the model context.
rationale: A scraped page can return executable content the agent might decide to forward into a tool call (`bash`, `eval`, etc.). Post-tool inspection strips it before it influences the next LLM step. Pairs with the input prompt-injection guardrail to bound where adversarial content can land.
